title: Alex's useless tweaks
description: Client sided mods for servers or singleplayer.
body:
## Alex's useless tweaks
Modpack for vanilla server players.

*Latest version is better for DonutSMP*

**Reporting issues is currently on discord**

### Contains:
- Xaeros maps
- EMI (or JEI can be enabled instead)
- Jade
- Replays (Flashback for 1.21.11 and ReplayMod for 1.21-1.21.1)
- Optimizations (Visual and RAM)
- Voxy (On 1.21-1.21.1 there is Distant Horizons)
- Litematica
- Discord RPC
- Sound and GUI additions
- And alot of other small tweaks
